name: Clockwork - Natalie Ouellette
description: Natalie Ouellette, or as she is more famously known, Clockwork, is a vengeful and cruel serial killer who mutilates her victims at night, and is commonly known for her clock in her eye. She was once a normal girl with interest in horror and a harsh life because of her Father, brother and school. All of this eventually leading to her losing her sanity, killing her family and becoming the killer she is known for today.
creator: snip22
